info.title: Spanda Control Center API
info.description: REST v1 gateway for enterprise operations — device pool, provisioning, drift, OTA, trust, SRE.

correlationId.name: X-Correlation-ID
correlationId.description: Optional request correlation ID; echoed in response

get.summary: Runtime status (bind, config, program, pool summary)
List devices in the device pool

post.summary: Assign device to robot or fleet
Trust / approve a device after operator review

encrypt.description: AES-256-GCM at rest (requires SPANDA_CONFIG_SNAPSHOT_KEY or SPANDA_CONFIG_SNAPSHOT_ENCRYPT=1)

get.summary: List enabled Control Center UI plugins

post.summary: Run readiness checks with device pool impact
Run operational drift scan and record result

baseline_id.description: Defaults to latest snapshot or SPANDA_DRIFT_SCAN_BASELINE_ID

200.description: Scan record with alert dispatch on failure

rollback_on_readiness_fail.description: Rollback agent when post-deploy readiness fails

readiness_runtime.description: Include runtime checks in post-deploy readiness gate

post.summary: Execute OTA rollout against deploy agents (dry_run supported)

rollback_on_readiness_fail.description: Rollback agent when post-deploy readiness fails

readiness_runtime.description: Include runtime checks in post-deploy readiness gate

get.summary: Full entity graph for traversal and visualization
Unified entity, program, and digital-thread traceability

post.summary: Relate two entities in mutation overlay
Sync mutation overlay entities to TOML fragments
Add or remove tags on an entity overlay record

get.summary: Relationship edges, impact analysis, dependency chain
Trust and security metadata for an entity
Distributed decision architecture for an entity
List decision architecture for loaded program
Offline policy specs from loaded program
List v3 distributed decision trace frames
Persisted signed offline policy cache on disk

post.summary: Simulation planning or driver execution (CLI parity)
Inspect or replay a mission trace (CLI parity)

get.summary: List mission trace files in project
Recent API trace records (OTLP-compatible export path)

post.summary: Push API traces to OTLP collector
Push API metrics to OTLP collector
Compliance export with JSON body profile
Import legacy twin replay JSON as structured snapshot
Sync mission twin for loaded program

get.summary: Export mutation audit for SIEM (CEF or JSONL)
List pending and resolved mission approval requests

post.summary: Submit a snapshot for operator approval

required_approvals.description: Distinct approvers required (defaults to SPANDA_CONFIG_APPROVALS_REQUIRED or 1)

post.summary: Approve and publish snapshot to runtime

200.description: Vote recorded; publish when quorum.met is true

post.summary: Reject a pending config publish request

get.summary: List configured and active HRI collaboration sessions

post.summary: Start a remote expert or collaborative HRI session
Publish an AR annotation to an active HRI session

get.summary: Replay artifact metadata for an HRI session
Live collaboration participant graph (humans, robots, sessions)
Hazard zones and human location context snapshot
List configured human operators and collaborators
Team readiness rollup with per-operator summary
Human digital twin metadata with health mirror gating
Wearable inventory with health opt-in gate status
Human health telemetry opt-in policy (config + env gate)
List facilities, zones, and gateways from smart-space config
Facility readiness score, gateways, zones, and continuity pairs
Zone occupancy snapshot and digital twin mirror
Energy systems (solar, battery, EV, demand response)
Emergency and life-safety status with continuity pairs
Smart Spaces blueprint rollup (facilities, energy, emergency)
Facility security and access control status
Energy system detail (SOC, generation, EV session)
